title: dryopteris filix-mas subsp. serratodentata
intro: Dryopteris filix-mas subsp. serratodentata is a subspecies of the common male fern, a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris filix-mas subsp. serratodentata include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as an antiseptic for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and promote overall well-being.
